title: Janice McNair memorial editorial cover
alt: An empty Houston football stadium at sunset with white flowers and a black memorial ribbon on the sideline.
caption: A respectful stadium tribute marking the death of Texans co-founder Janice McNair.

title: NFL suspension roundup editorial cover
alt: An anonymous defensive football player stands in a stadium tunnel behind dark vertical bands.
caption: A conceptual illustration for the league news roundup led by Charles Snowden's suspension.

title: Bills breakthrough editorial cover
alt: An anonymous running back in blue, red and white runs from a snowy tunnel toward a sunlit football field.
caption: A conceptual illustration of Buffalo's push to break through in the postseason.

title: Implied team totals analytics cover
alt: A football is surrounded by abstract charts, probability curves and glowing analytics markers.
caption: A conceptual visualization of how betting lines become implied team point totals.

title: Wide receiver free-agency interest cover
alt: An anonymous wide receiver at midfield faces five illuminated stadium tunnels and branching paths.
caption: A conceptual illustration of multiple teams weighing interest in veteran receiver Stefon Diggs.
